The schema.org ' 'documentation does not state that the Role type is an ' 'expected data type of author, creator and ' 'contributor, but that is addressed in this blog post ' '(http://blog.schema.org/2014/06/introducing-role.html). ' 'see ' 'https://github.com/ESIPFed/science-on-schema.org/blob/develop/guides/Dataset.md#roles-of-people', 'properties': {'@type': {'anyOf': [{'const': 'schema:Role', 'type': 'string'}, {'contains': {'const': 'schema:Role'}, 'items': {'type': 'string'}, 'type': 'array'}], 'default': 'schema:Role'}, 'schema:contributor': {'anyOf': [{'properties': {'@id': {'description': 'IRI ' 'reference ' 'to ' 'a ' 'Person ' 'or ' 'Organization ' 'defined ' 'elsewhere', 'type': 'string'}}, 'required': ['@id'], 'type': 'object'}, {'$ref': 'https://cross-domain-interoperability-framework.github.io/metadataBuildingBlocks/build/annotated/bbr/metadata/schemaorgProperties/person/schema.yaml'}, {'$ref': 'https://cross-domain-interoperability-framework.github.io/metadataBuildingBlocks/build/annotated/bbr/metadata/schemaorgProperties/organization/schema.yaml'}]}, 'schema:roleName': {'anyOf': [{'type': 'string'}, {'$ref': 'https://cross-domain-interoperability-framework.github.io/metadataBuildingBlocks/build/annotated/bbr/metadata/schemaorgProperties/definedTerm/schema.yaml'}]}}, 'required': ['schema:roleName', 'schema:contributor'], 'type': 'object', 'x-jsonld-prefixes': {'schema': 'http://schema.org/'}} On instance: {'@context': {'ex': 'https://example.org/', 'schema': 'http://schema.org/', 'xsd': 'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#'}, '@type': 'Role', 'contributor': {'@id': 'ex:exampleOrg_fW', '@type': 'schema:Organization', 'schema:alternateName': 'UAz', 'schema:description': 'University in Tucson, Arizona', 'schema:identifier': {'@type': 'schema:PropertyValue', 'schema:propertyID': 'https://registry.identifiers.org/registry/ror', 'schema:url': 'https://ror.org/03m2x1q45', 'schema:value': '03m2x1q45'}, 'schema:name': 'University of Arizona', 'schema:sameAs': ['Wildcats']}, 'roleName': 'owner'}

schema1:propertyID Literal("xas:pressure") ; schema1:unitText Literal("KPa") ; schema1:value Literal("3567") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("Absorption edge") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("xas:edge_energy") ; schema1:unitText Literal("eV") ; schema1:value Literal("12658.0") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("Installed Options") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("xas:installedOptions") ; schema1:value Literal("Description of extra equipment installed on the base instrument(?)") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("Instrument configuration") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("nxs:Group/NXentry/experiment_documentation") ; schema1:url Literal("http://protocols.io/link/to/calibrationMethod") ; schema1:value Literal("description of instrument configuration") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("calibration method") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("nxs:Group/NXdetector/calibration_method") ; schema1:url Literal("http://protocols.io/link/to/calibrationMethod") ; schema1:value Literal("description of calibration procedure") ] ; schema1:identifier Literal("20241111_DSC_NU_OREX-803224-0_1") ; schema1:location ex:xasfacility_37yht ; schema1:object [ rdf:type schema1:Product, schema1:Thing ; schema1:additionalProperty [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("Crystal unit cell dimensions") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("nxs:Field/NXsample/unit_cell") ; schema1:value Literal("cubic; Z = 4; a = 5.46; V = 162.77") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("Porosity") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("xas:porosity") ; schema1:unitText Literal("percent") ; schema1:value Literal("27") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("Stoichiometry") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("xas:stoichiometry") ; schema1:value Literal("Na2SeO4") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("crystallographic point group") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("nxs:Field/NXsample/point_group") ; schema1:value Literal("mm2") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("material state") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("xas:materialState") ; schema1:value Literal("solid metal foil") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("parent sample identifier") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("xas:parentSample") ; schema1:value Literal("igsn:10.3476/342573") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("samaple preparation method") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("xas:samplePreparation") ; schema1:value Literal("powder on tape, 6 layers") ], [ rdf:type schema1:PropertyValue ; schema1:name Literal("sample mass") ; schema1:propertyID Literal("nxs:Field/NXsample/mass") ; schema1:unitText Literal("mg") ; schema1:value Literal("10") ] ; schema1:additionalType Literal("MaterialSample"), Literal("https://w3id.org/isample/vocabulary/materialsampleobjecttype/materialsample") ; schema1:description Literal("physical properties of sample: ph, eh, volume, porosity, density, concentration, resistivity, viscosity, crystal structure, opacity from xdi list...") ; schema1:identifier Literal("igsn:10.6620/357lkj") ;
